title: gratiola griffithii
intro: Gratiola griffithii, also known as Griffith's pennywort, is a type of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is an annual herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gratiola griffithii include its potential to support brain function, improve memory, and reduce anxiety and stress. Gratiola griffithii can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used to support cognitive health and overall well-being.
